security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not check the integrity of vote messages.

assumptions: The governance contract does not verify the integrity of vote messages.
The actor can intercept and modify the vote message before it reaches the contract.

mitigation.strategy: Implement integrity checks (e.g., hash verification) for vote messages.

description: An attacker may modify a legitimate vote to alter the outcome of a proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: The system lacks mechanisms to verify the origin of votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not track the identity of voters securely.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record the identity of voters reliably.
The actor can cast votes anonymously or through proxies.

mitigation.strategy: Implement mechanisms (e.g., blockchain-based identity or zero-knowledge proofs) to prove the identity of voters.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their participation in the voting process.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data is not adequately protected during transmission or storage.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes may be intercepted and disclosed during transit or storage.

assumptions: The communication channel between the client and the contract is insecure.
The contract does not protect vote data from unauthorized access.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption and secure data storage for vote data.

description: An attacker may intercept and gain access to vote information.
